name: k02miu-devflow
description: DevFlow — multi-agent development workflow orchestration plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: devflow
plugins.description: Multi-agent development workflow orchestration: feature planning, issue resolution, branch finishing, PR creation, and multi-LLM review loops built on Agent Teams. Bundles context7 (library docs) and serena (semantic code search) MCP servers.

plugins.name: devflow-infra-mcp
plugins.description: Optional cloud knowledge MCP servers (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) for DevFlow's infrastructure agents. Install only if your project touches cloud infrastructure.
